title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two pictures, and say what might motivate people to volunteer abroad and what challenges they might face.

images.label: A
images.description: A young woman building a wooden house in a rural African village, surrounded by local children watching and smiling

images.label: B
images.description: A group of volunteers teaching English in a makeshift outdoor classroom in Southeast Asia, writing on a portable chalkboard

followUp.question: Which of these volunteer experiences do you think would be most personally rewarding, and why?

tasks.instructions: Compare the two pictures, and say what participants might learn from cultural exchange programmes and how the experience might change them.

images.label: D
images.description: A group of international students sharing a meal together, each person bringing food from their home country, arranged on a long communal table

images.label: E
images.description: A teenager living with a host family in Japan, wearing a school uniform and walking to school with her host siblings

followUp.question: Do you think cultural exchange programmes should be more widely available? Why or why not?
